title: pyrus jupiter
intro: Pyrus jupiter, also known as the Japanese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pyrus jupiter include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic and astringent. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and berries of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to address various health issues.
